uplink.description: fPort 6 report 0x01 temperature/humidity, positive temp, normal battery
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic input; expected.data authored from upstream-codec.js decode (Temp 27.8, Humi 53, Volt 2.8) normalized to vocabulary keys.

uplink.description: fPort 6 report 0x01 temperature/humidity, negative temp (two's complement)
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic input; bytes[8,9]=0xFFA0 decodes to -0.96 C, humidity 80*0.5=40%. Matches upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: fPort 6 report 0x01 with low-battery flag set (bytes[3] high bit)
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic input; bytes[3]=0x9C => low-battery flag + 2.8 V. Upstream emits Volt '2.8(low battery)'; normalized as battery 2.8 + lowBattery extra.

uplink.description: fPort 6 report 0x12 combined temp/humidity/illuminance, no alarms
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic input; bytes[6,7]=0x1450=5200*0.01=52% humidity, temp 27.8, illuminance 100 lux. Matches upstream-codec.js (alarms byte10=0).

uplink.description: fPort 6 report 0x12 negative temp with alarm flags set
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic input; bytes[6,7]=0x0BB8=3000*0.01=30% humidity, temp -0.96 C, illuminance 300 lux, alarm byte10=0x2A (high temp/humi/illum). Matches upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: fPort 6 report 0x00 device-info frame carries no measurement
uplink._note: reportType 0x00 (startup version report) carries no measurement; upstream emits Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode, not a normalized reading.

uplink.description: fPort 6 report 0x01 with T/H sensor reporting no valid measurement
uplink._note: bytes[5] bit0 clear => T/H invalid; upstream emits Temp '0xFFFF', Humi '0xFF'. Normalized as an error (no measurement).

uplink.description: fPort 7 config response is not a data report
uplink._note: fPort 7 carries config command responses (ConfigReportRsp), not measurements.
